title: Locate the Andromeda Galaxy
description: Use a planisphere star chart, red flashlight and basic telescope to locate our neighboring galaxy without ruining night vision.

dialogue.text: Nova here. Find a safe dark site, check the forecast, and let your eyes adjust for at least 15 minutes. Keep screens dim, then use a planisphere star chart and a red flashlight to preserve night vision. Ready?

Shield the red flashlight and trace Cassiopeia's W on the star chart. From its midpoint, sweep the basic telescope slightly toward a faint smudge—that's Andromeda. Keep the scope steady, watch your footing, and never aim near the Sun or aircraft.
Nice work! Record the position for next time, power down and cap the telescope, then pack the chart and flashlight before leaving the site.
